core_principles: Darkness is the Canvas: Use deep obsidian backgrounds, never pure black.
Data is Light: Information glows against the dark. Use color to signal status, not decoration.
Glass & Steel: Surfaces should feel like smoked glass (blur) or matte metal (noise).
Dense & Direct: Admins need density. Use the 'Bento' grid system to maximize screen real estate.

rules.headings: Uppercase letter-spacing (tracking-tight) for H1/H2. Font-weight: 700 or 900.
rules.body: High readability. Use text-slate-300 for secondary text, text-white for primary.
rules.numbers: Use JetBrains Mono for all IDs, IPs, timestamps, and financial metrics.

visual_enhancers.gradients: No full screen gradients. Use subtle radial-gradients for 'glow' effects behind cards.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-white/5. Active elements get border-primary/50.

layout_system.spacing: Compact. p-4 or p-6 for cards. gap-4 for grids.
layout_system.sidebar: Fixed width (260px). Darker than main content (bg-[#050505]). Border-right: 1px solid border-white/5.

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] transition-all active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-xl hover:border-white/10 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 transition-all placeholder:text-slate-600

login.layout: Split screen. Left: Abstract security visual. Right: Glass login form.
login.elements: TOTP input must be prominent. Use 'InputOTP' component.

dashboard.layout: Bento Grid. Hero card: Total Installations (Line Chart). Sub-cards: Active Users (Number), Revenue (Bar Chart).
dashboard.widgets: World Map for 'Country Distribution'. Donut chart for 'Plan Distribution'.

user_management.table_style: Striped rows (even: bg-white/2). Compact headers. Status badges (pill shaped).

feature_analytics.layout: Grid of 4 charts. 1. Secure Apps (Bar), 2. Biometric (Pie), 3. Language (List), 4. Time Trends (Area).

assets.icons: Use lucide-react. Examples: ShieldCheck, Users, Activity, Lock, Globe, CreditCard.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run `npm install framer-motion` (or yarn add). Use it for subtle page transitions.
2. SETUP: Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the custom colors and font families defined above.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Copy the CSS variables into `src/index.css` inside the `@layer base { :root { ... } }` and `.dark { ... }` blocks.
4. ROUTING: Ensure react-router-dom is set up with a layout wrapper that includes the Sidebar.
5. AUTH: Mock the Login flow. If email='admin@infinity.com' & password='admin' -> show OTP screen -> Any 6 digits -> Success.
6. MOCKED DATA: Create a `src/lib/mockData.js` file to populate charts and tables. Do not leave them empty.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
